parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  airport,
  COALESCE(origin, 'POA') AS origin,
  flight_date::text AS flight_date,
  city
FROM n8n_eventos
WHERE active = true
  AND flight_date >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND flight_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '60 days'
  AND airport IS NOT NULL
  AND airport != COALESCE(origin, 'POA')
ORDER BY flight_date ASC;

INSERT INTO n8n_monitoramento
  (evento_id, checked_at, price, airline, dep_time, arr_time, stops, triggered)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.evento_id }}',
  NOW(),
  {{ $json.price }},
  '{{ $json.airline }}',
  '{{ $json.dep_time }}',
  '{{ $json.arr_time }}',
  {{ $json.stops }},
  false
)
RETURNING id, evento_id, price;
